mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != '' AND ( -- 超级管理员（ROLE_ADMIN）默认拥有全部权限，避免菜单维护遗漏时仍提示"没有相关权限" EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.role_code = 'ROLE_ADMIN' ) OR m.id IN ( SELECT rm.menu_id FROM sys_role_menu rm INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ) )
